narrative.summary: Tokyo's cult organic matcha cafe — first North American location. Opened on Ossington strip. Ceremonial-grade matcha, minimal design, Japanese precision. No rating yet (brand new). Worth a deliberate stop for John’s design/architecture/art/food radar.

blocks.title: The Menu
blocks.body:
MATCHA BEVERAGES
⭐ Morning Matcha
   Matcha specially prepared for morning enjoyment
⭐ Matcha Latte
   Easy to make matcha latte at home
• At Home Matcha
   Vibrant green color matcha to add color to your home time

MATCHA ACCESSORIES & KITS
⭐ Matcha Cup & Spoon Set
   Convenient cup and spoon for casual matcha enjoyment
